offer: For property managers processing 10-20 lease renewals/month, inefficient tenant screening causes delays in securing tenants. We simplify the process instead of manual tenant screening and lease renewal processes.
problem: Inefficient tenant screening and lease renewal processes
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Join forums where property managers share tools
try_it: Let users try simple tenant screening checklist and templates
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
